audio_analysis_stats_t(3) Library Functions Manual audio_analysis_stats_t(3)

NAME

audio_analysis_stats_t - Audio analysis statistics for sent or received audio.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/audio/analysis.h>

Data Fields


uint64_t total_samples
float peak_level
float rms_level
uint64_t clipping_count
uint64_t silent_samples
float dc_offset
uint32_t packets_count
uint32_t packets_dropped
int64_t timestamp_start_ns
int64_t timestamp_end_ns
uint64_t jitter_count
uint64_t discontinuity_count
uint64_t avg_packet_spacing_ns
uint64_t max_gap_ns
uint64_t beep_events
uint64_t tonal_samples

Detailed Description

Audio analysis statistics for sent or received audio.

Definition at line 26 of file analysis.h.
